title: haplopappus hookerianus
intro: Haplopappus hookerianus, also known as Hooker's rabbitbrush, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Haplopappus hookerianus is used in herbal preparations like teas and infusions to alleviate coughs and soothe sore throats, as well as to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
